name: Growthik Media
description: Growthik Media is a Pune-based digital marketing and web development agency focused on SEO, Google Ads, Meta Ads, performance marketing, AI marketing automation and high-performance website development.

address.streetAddress: Akshay Palace CHS, Warje Malwadi Rd

services.name: SEO Services
services.description: Technical SEO, local SEO, on-page optimization, content planning and ranking reports for businesses in Pune and India.

services.name: Google Ads Management
services.description: Search, display, YouTube, conversion tracking, landing page optimization and ROAS-focused campaign management.

services.name: Meta Ads Management
services.description: Facebook and Instagram ad strategy, creative testing, retargeting and lead generation campaigns.

services.name: Website Development
services.description: Next.js, React, WordPress, ecommerce and custom web application development focused on speed, SEO and conversions.

services.name: AI Marketing Automation
services.description: AI-assisted marketing workflows, reporting automation, lead capture systems and growth operations.
